title: Integrated Bottom-Up and Top-Down Proteomics of Patient-Derived Breast Tumor Xenografts.
author: Ntai I LeDuc RD Fellers RT Erdmann-Gilmore P Davies SR Rumsey J Early BP Thomas PM Li S Compton PD Ellis MJ Ruggles KV Fenyo D Boja ES Rodriguez H Townsend RR Kelleher NL
content: S-EPMC4762530 PMC4762530 Integrated Bottom-Up and Top-Down Proteomics of Patient-Derived Breast Tumor Xenografts. Bottom-up proteomics relies on the use of proteases and is the method of choice for identifying thousands of protein groups in complex samples. Top-down proteomics has been shown
